assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address they can activate.
No Klarna playground Merchant portal account or API keys exist yet.
Playground test data is used; production contracts are out of scope.

developer_goal: Create a Klarna playground account, obtain test API credentials, and complete the earliest official Klarna Payments first-success path.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved among in-line widget one-time payment order creation, hosted payment page redirect, and other playground products such as On-site messaging or Express Checkout.
first_success.observable_signal: Payments docs show session initiation through order creation after widget authorize, but peer products and integration shapes define different terminals.

route_selection.surface: Klarna Docs playground signup plus Payments web integration guides
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete playground route only after product and integration shape (in-line widget versus HPP redirect) are fixed.

candidates.name: Klarna Payments in-line widget one-time payment
candidates.reason: Official prerequisites recommend the in-line widget, but one-time versus recurring intents and later authorize/create-order steps still branch the path.

candidates.name: Klarna Payments browser redirect / HPP
candidates.reason: Official prerequisites present HPP as a peer integration type with a different front-end surface and docs set.

candidates.name: On-site messaging or Express Checkout playground testing
candidates.reason: Before you test lists these as separate testing solutions with client identifiers and different first-success outcomes.

required_path.action: Sign up for a Klarna playground Merchant portal account from Klarna Docs login.
required_path.observable_result: Klarna sends a confirmation email to activate the account.

required_path.action: Open the confirmation email and choose Activate account.
required_path.observable_result: Klarna opens the finish-setup screens for the playground account.

required_path.action: Accept Terms & Conditions, set a password, enter a name, and log in to the Merchant portal.
required_path.observable_result: The developer is logged into the playground Merchant portal.

required_path.action: Generate Klarna API keys from Payment settings and download the credentials file.
required_path.observable_result: Playground API username and password are available once.

required_path.action: Integrate the selected Klarna Payments web path through session, checkout, and order creation.

required_fields.label: Authorize and create-order follow-through
required_fields.notes: Later steps depend on the selected intent and integration shape; a single field inventory was not frozen for one route.

required_path.observable_result: The selected Payments route reaches its documented order or authorization terminal.

prerequisites.description: Playground testing requires Merchant portal access and test API keys.
Sample customer and payment data must be used instead of real personal data.

external_gates.description: Production product availability may differ from playground based on contract.

unavoidable_waits.description: Klarna must deliver the signup confirmation email before account activation.

platform_outcomes.description: Klarna creates a playground Merchant portal account after activation and password setup.
Create-session returns session_id and client_token for widget launch.

excluded.item: Demo store browsing without the developer's MID
excluded.reason: Before you test states Demo store data is not linked to the merchant MID.

excluded.item: Order management after first order creation
excluded.reason: Payments prerequisites point order handling to a later Order management section.

uncertainties.question: Which Klarna playground product and Payments integration shape define the corpus first-success route?
uncertainties.impact: In-line widget, HPP redirect, On-site messaging, and Express Checkout change required implementation work and the observable terminal.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Choose one bounded product and integration shape, then verify the complete current docs path from playground signup through that terminal.

uncertainties.question: Are the docs under the acquirer/klarna web-payments tree the correct merchant self-serve route for all playground accounts?
uncertainties.impact: If acquirer versus merchant trees diverge, required steps and credentials may differ.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official confirmation that the opened Payments SDK guide is the current self-serve merchant playground path.
